summary: All six frontmatter/inline code_refs verified SUPPORTED against the LiveKit Python + JS clones, the otel histogram definitions, and the Pipecat observer docstring. The Modal quote is present and accurate (note abbreviates 'voice-to-voice' to 'v2v'). The only soft point is the Deepgram VAQI 'L' framing, which carries no line citation and is interpretive (UNVERIFIABLE, not WRONG). No WRONG or MISCITED claims. Overall PASS.
